site.name: Formax Builders
site.description: Premium construction services from foundation to finish. We deliver exceptional quality, safety, and craftsmanship for residential and commercial projects.

hero.headline: Building Your Future
hero.body: Premium construction services from foundation to finish. We deliver exceptional quality, safety, and craftsmanship for residential and commercial projects.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Complete Construction Services Since 2017
paragraphs: At Formax Builders, we provide end-to-end construction services from concept to completion. Our expertise spans house building, landscaping, architectural planning, and interior design. We transform your vision into stunning reality with our skilled craftsmen and modern techniques.

Whether you're building your dream home, renovating an existing space, or planning a commercial project, our licensed and insured team delivers exceptional results — with quality workmanship, timely completion, and outstanding customer service.

highlights.title: Award Winning
highlights.body: Recognized for excellence in construction and safety standards.

highlights.title: Fully Licensed
highlights.body: Licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

highlights.title: On-Time Delivery
highlights.body: On-time project completion with quality guaranteed.

services.body: From foundation to finish — every discipline you need under one roof.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Our Projects
projects.body: Residential, commercial and infrastructure work delivered across the region.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Start Your Project
contact.body: Ready to build something extraordinary? Let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life.

services.title: House Building
services.summary: Complete custom home construction from foundation to roof.
services.details: We build your dream home with premium materials, modern techniques, and exceptional craftsmanship — managing every stage from groundwork to handover.

services.title: Landscaping
services.summary: Transform your outdoor spaces into something remarkable.
services.details: Professional landscaping including garden design, hardscaping, irrigation systems, and outdoor lighting for beautiful, low-maintenance exteriors.

services.title: Architectural Planning
services.summary: Expert planning and design from concept to blueprint.
services.details: From initial concept to detailed blueprints and approvals, we ensure your vision becomes a structural reality that's buildable, compliant and beautiful.

services.title: Interior Design
services.summary: Beautiful, functional interiors tailored to you.
services.details: Complete interior solutions including space planning, material selection, furniture layout, and decorative finishes for spaces that work and wow.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.summary: Safe, modern electrical installation and maintenance.
services.details: Complete electrical installation and maintenance, including smart home automation and energy-efficient solutions for homes and businesses.

services.title: Plumbing Solutions
services.summary: Reliable plumbing for residential and commercial sites.
services.details: Professional plumbing installation, repair, and maintenance for residential and commercial properties — clean water in, waste water out, no surprises.

services.title: Renovation & Remodeling
services.summary: Breathe new life into existing spaces.
services.details: Full and partial renovations that modernise, expand and add value — from single rooms to whole-building transformations, on schedule and on budget.

services.title: Project Management
services.summary: One accountable team for the whole build.
services.details: End-to-end project management covering budgeting, scheduling, procurement, safety and quality control so your project lands on time and on budget.

projects.title: Luxury Housing Development
projects.summary: A premium 50-unit residential complex featuring sustainable design, smart home technology, and luxury amenities throughout.
projects.details: This flagship residential development blends sustainable construction with smart-home technology across 50 luxury units. From the foundation works to the landscaped common areas, every detail was managed in-house to LEED standards.

projects.title: Corporate Headquarters
projects.summary: Modern 8-story office building with advanced HVAC systems and energy-efficient design.
projects.details: An 8-storey corporate headquarters delivered with advanced HVAC, a glazed curtain-wall facade and energy-efficient building systems — completed ahead of schedule.

projects.title: Manufacturing Facility
projects.summary: State-of-the-art warehouse with heavy-duty construction and advanced logistics systems.
projects.details: A heavy-duty manufacturing and logistics facility built for scale, with reinforced flooring, wide-span steel structure and integrated material-handling systems.

projects.title: Historic Building Restoration
projects.summary: Complete restoration preserving architectural heritage while adding modern functionality.
projects.details: A sensitive restoration that preserved the building's heritage facade and detailing while introducing modern services, accessibility and energy performance.

projects.title: Highway Bridge Construction
projects.summary: Major infrastructure project with advanced engineering and safety protocols.
projects.details: A major highway bridge delivered with rigorous engineering controls and an exemplary safety record across a complex, live-traffic environment.

projects.title: Shopping Center
projects.summary: Modern retail complex with sustainable materials and energy-efficient design.
projects.details: A modern retail destination built with sustainable materials, naturally-lit malls and energy-efficient services across two levels of retail and dining.

projects.title: University Campus
projects.summary: Modern educational facility with advanced learning spaces and safety features.
projects.details: A new academic block with flexible learning spaces, laboratories and student amenities, designed for accessibility, daylight and future expansion.

projects.title: Medical Center
projects.summary: Specialized healthcare facility with advanced medical infrastructure and patient comfort.
projects.details: A specialised medical centre delivered to strict healthcare standards, with advanced MEP infrastructure, infection-control detailing and calming patient environments.

testimonials.quote: Formax Builders delivered our office building ahead of schedule and under budget. Their attention to safety and quality standards was exceptional throughout the entire project.
testimonials.name: Michael Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Working with Formax Builders was a seamless experience. They transformed our vision for a modern residential complex into reality with incredible craftsmanship and professional management.
testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.quote: The team's expertise in commercial construction is unmatched. Our new warehouse exceeded all expectations in functionality, safety, and energy efficiency.
testimonials.name: David Chen

certifications.title: LEED Certified
certifications.body: Green Building Council certified for sustainable construction practices.

certifications.title: OSHA Certified
certifications.body: Occupational Safety and Health Administration compliance certification.

certifications.title: Better Business Bureau A+
certifications.body: Highest rating for business excellence and customer satisfaction.

certifications.title: Fully Insured & Bonded
certifications.body: Comprehensive insurance coverage and surety bonds for all projects.

certifications.title: Excellence in Construction
certifications.body: Regional recognition for outstanding construction quality and innovation.

story: Formax Builders was founded in 2017 with a simple belief: construction should be honest, safe and beautifully finished. What began as a small team of craftsmen has grown into a full-service builder trusted across residential, commercial and infrastructure projects.

Today our licensed and insured teams handle everything from architectural planning to the final coat of paint — keeping a single point of accountability from the first sketch to the day you get the keys.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Build it right, the first time
mission.body: To deliver construction that is safe, sustainable and finished to a standard we'd be proud to live and work in — on time and on budget, every time.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.title: The region's most trusted builder
vision.body: To be the partner clients return to for a lifetime of projects, known for craftsmanship, integrity and an uncompromising safety culture.

values.title: Safety First
values.body: Everyone goes home safe. Safety is designed into every task, not added afterwards.

values.title: Craftsmanship
values.body: We sweat the details others skip — because quality is what lasts.

values.title: Integrity
values.body: Transparent pricing, honest timelines, and no surprises.

values.title: Sustainability
values.body: Efficient methods and materials that respect budgets and the planet.

process.title: Consult & Plan
process.body: We listen, survey the site, and shape your brief into a clear scope, budget and timeline.

process.title: Design & Approve
process.body: Architectural drawings, 3D visuals and permits — everything signed off before we break ground.

process.title: Build & Manage
process.body: Skilled crews and tight project management deliver the work safely and on schedule.

process.title: Finish & Handover
process.body: Snagging, quality checks and a clean handover — plus aftercare you can count on.

contact.formBody: Tell us about your project, timeline and budget. Our team replies within 1–2 business days.
contact.mapBody: Visit our office or schedule a site visit anywhere in the region.

privacy.policyIntro: Formax Builders respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacy.dataWeCollect: We collect the details you submit through our contact form — your name, email, phone number, project type and message.
privacy.howWeUse: We use your information solely to respond to your enquiry, prepare quotes, and manage your project. We never sell your data.
privacy.cookies: We use minimal cookies and basic analytics to understand site usage and improve our service.
privacy.yourRights: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by emailing us.
privacy.changes: We may update this policy occasionally. The latest version will always be available on this page.

designStyles.name: Box-Model / Minimalist
designStyles.body: Pure geometric volumes, uninterrupted planes and a restrained palette. We let light, proportion and craftsmanship do the talking — nothing excessive, everything intentional.

designStyles.name: Fusion / Traditional Hybrid
designStyles.body: A balance of timeless craftsmanship and contemporary comfort — traditional motifs, natural stone and woodwork reimagined with modern layouts, glazing and finishes.

designStyles.name: Tropical Contemporary
designStyles.body: Designed for warm climates — cross-ventilation, deep shade, indoor-outdoor living and lush courtyards paired with clean contemporary detailing and natural textures.
